questions.question: What is the recommended maximum character length for an HTML <title> tag for SEO?
questions.explanation: Search engines typically display only the first 50-60 characters of a title tag. Longer titles get truncated in results.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the canonical link tag?
options: To redirect users to a different page
To specify the preferred URL for duplicate content
To declare the charset of the document
questions.answer: To specify the preferred URL for duplicate content
questions.explanation: The canonical tag tells search engines which URL is the 'master' version when the same content exists at multiple URLs, preventing duplicate content penalties.

questions.question: What Open Graph image size is recommended for the best social media preview?
questions.explanation: 1200×630px is the recommended size for og:image as it displays well on Facebook, LinkedIn, and most social platforms.

questions.question: What format does Google prefer for structured data markup?
questions.explanation: Google recommends JSON-LD for structured data as it is easy to implement and doesn't require mixing with HTML markup.

questions.question: Which meta robots value would prevent a page from appearing in search results?
questions.explanation: The 'noindex' directive tells search engine crawlers not to include the page in their index, removing it from search results.
